message:
test(ffs-block): recalibrate p99 lookup latency baseline for Contabo VPS fleet

Bump BASELINE_LOOKUP_P99_US from 10.4us to 15.0us to reflect the rch
worker fleet running on Contabo VPS instances, which consistently
measure 14.0-14.6us. The original 10.4us baseline was calibrated on
a different dev machine and caused false regression alerts on the
production worker fleet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
